candidate.title: Kunlunxin R200 and R200-8F accelerator catalog field promotion

local_checks.raw_manifest_scan: Existing local capture found and reused: raw/crawler/compute-accelerators-kunlunxin-r200/20260628T060651804777Z-www-kunlunxin-com-product-274-html-d12bf3953a.md. No new external fetch was needed.
local_checks.wiki_search: Existing curated comparison text mentioned Kunlunxin R200/R200-8F as raw comparison evidence, but no kunlunxin-r200 or kunlunxin-r200-8f SKU, observation, or resolved-spec row existed before this parent task. Kunlunxin RG800 resolved rows from r9 task-2 remain unchanged.
local_checks.domain_index_scan: ai_infra wiki/index.md routes this work to Compute Accelerator Spec Catalog, Compute Accelerator Parameter Comparison, and AI Infra Coverage Map; no dedicated Kunlunxin R200 page was needed.
local_checks.prior_manifest_scan: Prior continuation parent-1 through parent-9 manifests cover Corigine, SGLang, Yusur, NVIDIA H200, Kubernetes/Kueue/Volcano, AWS/Lambda, Resnics N2025, NVIDIA confidential inference, and Asterfusion. This task does not repeat those rows and promotes only the Kunlunxin R200 source-visible product-spec slice.

duplicate_boundary_checks.result: Hardware layer previously listed Kunlunxin R200/R200-8F as unresolved multi-variant evidence. Parent-10 records a narrower boundary where the product page explicitly separates R200 and R200-8F memory and power while sharing series compute, memory bandwidth, host interface, and form factor values.
Added one known_source entry for parent-10 Kunlunxin R200 fields without mutating blocked_items or unrelated coverage gaps.
No pre-existing kunlunxin-r200 or kunlunxin-r200-8f SKU rows; added one SKU per source-visible variant. Existing kunlunxin-rg800 rows were not changed.

No pre-existing R200/R200-8F observations; added variant-scoped observations for form_factor, int8_tops, fp16_tflops, fp32_tflops, memory_type, memory_capacity, memory_bandwidth, host_interface, and tdp.
No pre-existing R200/R200-8F resolved fields; added resolved fields pointing to new R200/R200-8F observations only.

Existing kunlunxin-r200-product-page source registry entry was reused; the source registry was not modified because it was outside the planner allowed_paths and already contained the needed source_id.
Existing raw comparison row remains, now with resolved-spec citation and explicit INT16 comparison-only caveat.
Catalog coverage text now treats R200 and R200-8F as separated structured variants and keeps unsupported INT16/benchmark/throughput claims outside resolved fields.

gap_reason: The local corpus already contained an official product-specific Kunlunxin R200 series capture with source-visible, schema-supported fields for two explicit variants that had not yet been promoted into the structured accelerator catalog.

fields.host_interface: PCIe Gen4 x16 compatible with Gen3/2/1
PCIe Gen4 x16 compatible with Gen3/2/1

schema_boundary.boundary: Kept as comparison-only evidence because spec-fields.yaml has no int16_tops field. No resolved INT16 catalog field was added.

schema_boundary.source_value: R200 and R200-8F share architecture, precision, compute, memory bandwidth, PCIe compatibility, process, encode/decode, cooling, ECC, application, form factor, and software text on one product page.
schema_boundary.boundary: Shared source-visible values receive separate per-variant observation IDs so each resolved SKU points to its own source observation; variant-specific memory capacity and power remain separated.

schema_boundary.source_value: Product page states inference and training applications plus NLP, CV, speech, and traditional ML tasks.
schema_boundary.boundary: Application text is not promoted into throughput, benchmark, production-operation, service-SLO, training-performance, or inference-performance fields.

schema_boundary.source_value: R480-X8 and other Kunlunxin products are linked from the page navigation.
schema_boundary.boundary: No R480-X8 aggregate-system, R100, K100, K200, RG800, cloud offering, or portfolio row is modified or promoted by parent-10.

non_promoted_boundaries: No Kunlunxin RG800 resolved field changed; prior r9 task-2 Kunlunxin RG800 boundaries remain intact.
No Kunlunxin R480-X8, R100, K100, K200, Huawei Atlas, Cambricon, Biren, MetaX, Moore Threads, NVIDIA, AMD, Intel, DPU, SmartNIC, cloud offering, or aggregate system row was promoted by this task.

No benchmark ranking, production incident/postmortem, service SLO, training throughput, inference throughput, local benchmark baseline, MLCommons submission, legal-compliance completion, or general AI cluster performance claim was promoted from the Kunlunxin R200 page.
No new external source was fetched, and no crawler subscriptions or Domain Channels were changed.
